title: potentilla canescens subvar. vinosa
intro: Potentilla canescens subvar. vinosa, also known as Pale cinquefoil, is a flowering plant in the rose family that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Potentilla canescens subvar. vinosa include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
